body:
## Summary
- pass Codex relay config through acpx using a custom `--agent` command when Codex env vars are present
- inject `openai_base_url` from `OPENAI_BASE_URL` / `CODEX_BASE_URL`
- inject `model` from `OPENAI_MODEL` / `CODEX_MODEL`
- keep non-Codex and no-relay cases unchanged

## Verification
- `npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/acpx-adapter.test.js`
- `npm test`

## Context
Previous run got past `AUTH_REQUIRED` but Codex still called `api.openai.com`, causing the relay key to fail as an official OpenAI key. This patch makes the Codex ACP command receive the configured relay base URL.
title: Inject Codex ACP base URL config
